ksa_text: Lead enterprise AI ethics reviews for high-stakes applications, including impact assessments, bias audits, and explainability documentation prior to production deployment.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although AI Governance is an edge domain for the VP Analytics, this task KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.472) and conceptual alignment to include at the vp level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (AI Governance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.472). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the VP Analytics versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act (Article 9), and OECD AI Principles confirm AI governance as a critical competency for responsible AI leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with AI Governance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for VP Analytics.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain AI Governance task KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.472. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the VP Analytics.
